appStoreInformation.description:
Borderly simplifies international travel by auto-generating customs and immigration forms for 8 countries. Fill out your passport information once, and let Borderly create the required forms for all your destinations.

🛂 KEY FEATURES

• Passport Scanning: Use your camera to scan passport MRZ (Machine Readable Zone) for instant data capture
• Smart Forms: Auto-generate country-specific customs and immigration forms
• 8-Country Support: Japan, Malaysia, Singapore, Thailand, Vietnam, United Kingdom, United States, Canada
• QR Code Wallet: Store submission QR codes offline for easy airport access
• Step-by-Step Guides: Follow detailed instructions for each government portal
• Privacy First: All data stays on your device - no servers, no tracking

🔐 PRIVACY & SECURITY

• Zero-Server Architecture: Your passport data never leaves your device
• Biometric Protection: Face ID/Touch ID required for sensitive data access
• Encrypted Storage: Military-grade encryption for all stored information
• No Tracking: No analytics, no data collection, no third-party services
• Offline First: Works completely offline after initial setup

🌍 SUPPORTED COUNTRIES

• Japan: Visit Japan Web integration with QR code generation
• Malaysia: MDAC (Malaysia Digital Arrival Card) form preparation
• Singapore: SG Arrival Card auto-completion
• Thailand: Thailand Pass application with health declarations
• Vietnam: e-Visa portal integration with document upload support
• United Kingdom: ETA (Electronic Travel Authorisation) application
• United States: ESTA (Electronic System for Travel Authorization)
• Canada: eTA (Electronic Travel Authorization) with background checks

✈️ HOW IT WORKS

1. Scan your passport with the built-in MRZ reader
2. Create a trip with your destination countries
3. Review auto-filled forms with smart field detection
4. Follow step-by-step guides to submit forms to government portals
5. Store received QR codes in the offline wallet

🎯 PERFECT FOR

• Global business travelers visiting multiple countries
• International tourists exploring diverse destinations
• Frequent travelers tired of re-entering the same information
• Privacy-conscious travelers who want to keep data local
• Anyone visiting popular destinations requiring digital forms
• Multi-country trip planners needing efficient form management

Borderly transforms the tedious process of filling out government forms into a simple, one-time setup. Whether you're visiting Tokyo, London, New York, or Bangkok, Borderly ensures you have the right forms ready when you need them.

Download Borderly and experience stress-free international travel with privacy-first technology.
appStoreInformation.keywords: travel, passport, customs, immigration, japan, malaysia, singapore, thailand, vietnam, united kingdom, united states, canada, forms, QR code, MRZ, scanner, privacy, offline, international travel, visit japan web, mdac, sg arrival card, thailand pass, vietnam e-visa, uk eta, esta, canada eta

demoAccount.notes: No demo account required. App works with passport scanning and form generation without server authentication.

appReviewInformation.notes:
This app helps international travelers fill out customs and immigration forms for 8 countries: Japan, Malaysia, Singapore, Thailand, Vietnam, United Kingdom, United States, and Canada. Key testing points:

1. Passport Scanning: Use device camera to scan passport MRZ (Machine Readable Zone). Any valid passport will work for testing the OCR functionality.

2. Form Generation: Create a trip to any of the 8 supported countries to see auto-filled government forms. The app demonstrates how traveler data is mapped to country-specific requirements.

3. QR Code Wallet: After form generation, users can simulate receiving QR codes and storing them offline.

4. Privacy Features: All data is stored locally using iOS Keychain. No network calls are made except when users manually submit forms to official government portals.

5. Government Portal Integration: The app provides step-by-step guides for official portals including Visit Japan Web, Malaysia MDAC, Singapore SG Arrival Card, Thailand Pass, Vietnam e-Visa, UK ETA, US ESTA, and Canada eTA.

6. Multi-Country Support: Test complex trips involving multiple countries to see how the app handles different form requirements and submission timelines.

Permissions:
• Camera: Required for passport MRZ scanning
• Face ID/Touch ID: Required for secure data access
• No network permissions for personal data

The app is designed for travelers 16+ who possess passports. All personal data remains on-device with zero-server architecture for maximum privacy.

Contact for questions: appstore@borderly.app

versionReleaseInformation.whatsNewInThisVersion:
Welcome to Borderly!

• Passport MRZ scanning with camera
• Auto-generated forms for 8 countries: Japan, Malaysia, Singapore, Thailand, Vietnam, United Kingdom, United States, Canada

Start your stress-free international travel experience today!

exportCompliance.notes: App uses only standard encryption provided by iOS APIs (Keychain, SQLite encryption). No custom encryption algorithms.

contentRating.ratingJustification: This app is designed for international travelers and contains no objectionable content. Suitable for all ages but primarily useful for travelers 16+ who possess passports.

appIcon.notes: High-quality app icon representing travel, passport scanning, and border crossing themes

localizations.notes: Initial release supports English only. Future updates will add Japanese, Chinese, and Malay based on target countries.

testing.testingNotes: Focus testing on passport scanning accuracy, form generation for different passport types, and government portal navigation flows.

uniqueSellingPoints: 8-country form support including Asia, Europe, North America
Passport MRZ scanning with instant data capture
Government portal integration with step-by-step guides
Smart delta forms showing only country-specific fields
marketing.competitorDifferentiation: Unlike other travel apps, Borderly focuses specifically on customs/immigration forms with absolute privacy - no data ever leaves your device. Supports the most comprehensive set of popular travel destinations with intelligent form generation.
